# Component Name Explained

## 1. Beginner Summary

Write a plain-language summary.

## 2. What This Component Does

Describe the component responsibilities.

## 3. What This Component Does Not Do

List explicit non-responsibilities and forbidden boundaries.

## 4. Input and Output

Describe inputs, outputs, formats, and trust assumptions.

## 5. Step-by-Step Mechanism

Explain the mechanism in order.

## 6. Important Data Structures

Define key data structures.

## 7. Theory Behind the Implementation

Explain the linguistic, cognitive, computational, or statistical theory.

## 8. Mathematical Formulas, If Any

Include formulas or state that none are used.

## 9. Meaning of Each Variable in the Formula

Define each symbol and variable.

## 10. Weighting Rationale, If Weights Are Used

Explain weights or state that none are used.

## 11. Ranking Rationale, If Ranking Is Used

Explain ranking logic or state that ranking is not used.

## 12. Why This Design Was Selected Over Alternatives

Compare the selected design with alternatives.

## 13. Security and Privacy Considerations

Discuss untrusted input, real-data restrictions, secrets, dependencies, and unsafe operations.

## 14. Tests Added

List tests and what they protect against.

## 15. Known Limitations

List limitations and open risks.

## 16. What To Read Next

Link related docs and components.
